title: SV interface name collision in different parts of design hierarchy -- Verilator muddles names between levels of hierarchy

features.name: SV interface array with size 1
features.description: Code should include a single-element array declaration of an SV interface with modport (e.g., AXIS_IF.master m_axis_if[0:0])

features.name: interface signal assignment in module with single-element interface array
features.description: Code should include an assignment to an interface signal (tdata) within a module that instantiates a single-element interface array, where Verilator incorrectly determines modport direction

features.name: SV interface with master and slave modports
features.description: Code should include an SV interface definition that declares both master and slave modports, which Verilator confuses when the interface is used as a single-element array
